title: Iron plate — identical C/C++ twins on Python field face
motto: What we can convert identically lands on the plate. It always breaks down to assembly, entropy, and field.

assembly.statement: Bottom — FieldX86 insn belt, native wave-convert, or gpy hot path

entropy.statement: Thermo fold — entropy_fold, phi blend, irreversible mix

field.statement: Top — depth-0 program, die slots, epoch loop on singular plane

truth_blocks.statement: Bigger verified blocks carved from iron twins — more blocks unlock free plate melding
